mapper.select: select id, profit_amount, source_type, source_id, source_desc, image_url, remark, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status from profit_flow where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, SUM(profit_amount) AS profit FROM profit_flow WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND create_time IS NOT NULL and create_time >= #{date} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) order by DATE(create_time)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS date, SUM(profit_amount) AS profit FROM profit_flow WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND create_time IS NOT NULL and create_time >= #{date} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') order by DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m')
mapper.insert: insert into profit_flow(id, profit_amount, source_type, source_id, source_desc, image_url, remark, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values (#{id}, #{profitAmount}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceDesc}, #{imageUrl}, #{remark}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status})

insert into profit_flow(id,profit_amount, source_type, source_id, source_desc, image_url, remark, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.profitAmount}, #{entity.sourceType}, #{entity.sourceId}, #{entity.sourceDesc}, #{entity.imageUrl}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})

insert into profit_flow(id,profit_amount, source_type, source_id, source_desc, image_url, remark, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.profitAmount}, #{entity.sourceType}, #{entity.sourceId}, #{entity.sourceDesc}, #{entity.imageUrl}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})
on duplicate key update profit_amount = values(profit_amount), source_type = values(source_type), source_id = values(source_id), source_desc = values(source_desc), image_url = values(image_url), remark = values(remark), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time), status = values(status)
